title: ononis reclinata f. inclusa
intro: Ononis reclinata f. inclusa is a lesser-known variety of the Ononis reclinata plant, a type of flowering legume native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating kidney stones and urinary tract infections due to its diuretic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, alleviating symptoms of menopause, and supporting kidney function. Herbal preparations of Ononis reclinata f. inclusa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use and efficacy are still largely anecdotal and require further scientific study.
